content.en:
Ge Fei Yuanzu fled, which was not a big problem for Ye Tian at all.

In the future, his strength will be stronger, and Gefei Yuanzu will not dare to appear, otherwise he will die.

Therefore, he didn't care much about Gefei Yuanzu.

In addition, through this incident, Ye Tian's strength was exposed.

The outside world knows that he has the strength of a half-step Eternal Realm, and he is a half-step Eternal Realm with the ability of a clone.

Even if it was an incomparably powerful half-step Eternal Realm, it would not offend Ye Tian without huge benefits.

The Primordial Tree is indeed precious, but that is all speculation, and they are not sure that they will snatch the Primordial Tree, so they will not do it.

Otherwise, once they offended a supreme person like Ye Tian with an infinite future, if Ye Tian's cultivation was promoted to a ninefold supreme being, or even a half-step eternal realm, then they would be in big trouble.

Therefore, the other supreme beings were even half-step Eternal Realm and gave up the idea of dealing with Ye Tian.

The Dark Forbidden Realm has also calmed down, and the invincible people of the Terran race have gradually dared to leave the Dark Forbidden Realm and go to the outside world.

And Ye Tian also began to practice in retreat to improve his cultivation.

Anyway, he didn't lack resources now, so he naturally wanted to raise his cultivation to the eightfold supreme realm as soon as possible.

The stronger the strength, the more treasures and good places you can go.

There are too many mysterious places in the Source Sea, and his current strength is not qualified to come into contact with the true secrets of the Source Sea, and even the Void Source Ancestor of the Void Source Hall was just an ordinary half-step Eternal Realm at the beginning, and in the eyes of ordinary supremes, he is a truly invincible existence, and he is the top combat power of the Source Sea.

But in fact, the Void Origin Ancestor was really not qualified.

Seeing the existence of the Eternal Realm, Ye Tiancai truly realized that a powerhouse like the Void Origin Ancestor was really nothing.

Even if he used the fingers of the Eternal Realm now, it would be enough to fight with the Void Origin Ancestor.

"At the beginning, the number of Void Sons and Void Divine Sons was so scarce, in fact, many powerful invincible people didn't look down on the Void Source Monument of the Void Source Hall at all, and it was only some weak and Eternal Heaven and Earth invincibles who were eager to become Void Children!" Ye Tian muttered.

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to practice.

In the years that followed, the human race gave birth to a supreme being.

For example, Ye Tian's daughter and sister have also broken through to the supreme realm.

Moreover, Ye Tian provided a large amount of eternal resources to the human race, at least for a long time, anyone who reached the supreme level would be eligible for some eternal resources.

This is Ye Tian's welfare to the human race.

Unconsciously, the years of calamity have passed.

10,000 Tribulation Dollars!

20,000 catastrophes!

30,000 Tribulation Dollars!

......

Ye Jinpeng and Ye Xingchen and other supreme beings have gradually ascended to the realm of the double supreme, and the number of supreme beings born in the human race has reached more than ten, gradually catching up with the Tianlin realm.

Before you know it, the protection period of the Dark Forbidden Realm is approaching the 100,000 eons of the Yuan Dynasty.

And at this time, Ye Tian had also cultivated to the peak realm of the Sevenfold Supreme, and he could step into the Eightfold Supreme realm at any time.

Not only that, but his comprehension of the eternal rules reached an extremely terrifying level, because he copied the innate eternal life again and again, and comprehended the innate eternal rules.

Therefore, Ye Tian knew a lot about the innate eternal rules, and the eternal skills he created were naturally stronger.

In addition, Ye Tian's foundation is extremely solid.

It was also because of the foundation problem that he had spent so long cultivating, otherwise, he would have broken through to the Eightfold Supreme Realm a long time ago, and he would not have waited until today.

this day.

Ye Tian began to impact the Eightfold Supreme Realm, and after taking a few treasure resources to assist in breaking through, Ye Tian easily broke through to the Eightfold Supreme Realm, and his strength once again crossed a limit.

At this time, his combat power was already equivalent to an ordinary half-step Eternal Realm, not the weakest half-step Eternal Realm.

However, at this level, if Ye Tian wanted to quickly cultivate to the realm of the Nine Folds Supreme One, it was unlikely.

Unless he obtains those resources from the Primordial Sea Black Mist Worm Branch, the Primordial Sea can only be opened once in a long time, and a hundred thousand Tribulation Yuan is nothing.

According to what he knew, the time interval between the opening of the Primordial Sea was 10 million Tribulation Time.

Even so, many supreme beings were waiting to get up, but Ye Tian couldn't afford to wait.

He couldn't wait such a long time, maybe he wouldn't need the resources of the Primordial Sea by then.

Therefore, he wanted to get out of the primordial sea as soon as possible.

It's not that the Primordial Sea can't come out, for example, those two Eternal Realms can tear apart the Primordial Sea Void with their hands and take away so many black fog insects from the Primordial Sea.

Therefore, he can also come out of the primordial sea, as long as his strength is strong enough, or he has special means.

In these years, Ye Tian's Black Mist Worm clone had cultivated to the extreme of the Nine Fold Realm, and he could step into the half-step Eternal Realm at any time.

Moreover, the Black Mist Worm clone also comprehended an eternal technique suitable for the Black Mist Worm clone, combined with the Black Mist Worm race, he even thought of an excellent means to improve his strength, but that would have a significant impact on the foundation.

But this is just a clone, even if you pay for this clone, as long as you bring the treasure out, everything is worth it.

this day.

Ye Tian's black mist insect clone came to the Primordial Tree, and he uprooted the Primordial Tree and put it into the space in his body.

Subsequently, he also took away the resources that were newly born in the original sea.

"I have to leave, otherwise I will be discovered by the powers of the Eternal Realm, it is a trivial matter that my clone has fallen, if those resources are taken away, the loss will be too great!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he began to attack the Supreme Realm.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian cast an eternal technique that devoured other lives—the Black Mist Insect Devouring Technique!

Suddenly, a large number of black mist insects were devoured by Ye Tian's black mist insect clone and entered his body, and were refined by other people, turning into a force to help him impact the half-step Eternal Realm.

Soon, the shackles were broken!

The biggest difference between the Half-Step Eternal Realm and the Supreme One is that the Supreme One is the unity of the body and soul, not separating each other, but the body and the eternal rules are not one.

And the half-step eternal realm is that the body and the eternal rules have reached a degree of fit, and this fit is used to break the shackles, so as to be promoted to the half-step eternal realm, but in fact, there is no real fusion, just blending together.

It's like mixing two wines together, it looks like one wine, but if you look closely, it's still a mixture of two wines.

Because of this, the half-step eternal realm is called a half-step.

And the Black Mist Worm clone is to forcibly use a large number of Black Mist Worms as energy, forcibly allowing the eternal rules in the body to blend with the body, so as to cross over to the half-step Eternal Realm.

This approach is not good for the foundation, and the future potential will be affected, and there is no hope of becoming an eternal state.

But Ye Tian didn't care about this.

After breaking through to the half-step Eternal Realm, Ye Tian continued to devour other Black Mist Worms, and his strength became stronger and stronger.
